name: Suma

description_long: MISCATEGORIZATION DETECTED: The entity 'Suma' referenced in this profile is Hebanthe eriantha, a tropical plant species native to the Amazon rainforest used in traditional Brazilian medicine. The website content from Verywell Health describes suma as a dietary supplement marketed for inflammation reduction, stress relief, and potential mental health support—not as a consumer finance product or service. The current categorization as 'payday-alternatives' is fundamentally incorrect. Suma has no connection to lending, credit, emergency cash, personal loans, or any financial services. The company appears to be either a supplement manufacturer/distributor (not identified in the provided content) or a confusion with a financial services firm of the same name. The website URL points to health and wellness content exclusively, with no financial products, loan terms, APR disclosures, or consumer finance information present. Any legitimate financial services company named 'Suma' would require separate documentation with actual banking/lending details. This profile cannot be completed as a consumer finance entity based on the provided data.
